details.test: Task 1: Kitchen renovation quote under $25k for 120 sq ft in Boston
Task 2: Shortlist three modern residential projects (2022+ with medium budgets)
Task 3: Book 60-minute on-site consultation next month for home extension
Task 4: Select most affordable 3+ bedroom design package under 1,800 sq ft
Task 5: Save shortest recent article about sustainable building materials
Task 6: Compare mid-range vs premium estimates for 1,600 sq ft home and save higher-cost option
Task 7: Contact nearest office for small commercial fit-out in ZIP 10001
Task 8: Build custom construction package under $350,000 and add to inquiry cart
Task 9: Favorite highest-rated renovation testimonial completed in <= 4 months
